mnemonics: B.O.A.T. for AI Resources: Books (B), Online Courses (O), Academic Papers (A), Tutorials (T)
keyPoints: Prioritize foundational textbooks for theoretical understanding.
Utilize online courses and MOOCs for practical, hands-on learning.
Engage with academic papers and journals to stay current with cutting-edge research.
commonMistakes: Relying solely on one type of resource (e.g., only video tutorials) without building a strong theoretical foundation.
Using outdated resources that do not reflect the current state of AI technology and practices.
